title: overduetaskescalation process
content:
# overduetaskescalation process

## escalation level
- L1：overdue1-3days，notifytaskownerandprimarymanage
- L2：overdue4-7days，escalate toProject Manager，requirement48hoursinternalsubmitplanning
- L3：overdue>7days，escalate todepartment director，launchdedicateditems

## escalation process
1. auto-detectionoverduetask
2. overduedayscount determinedescalation level
3. analysisoverdueoriginaldue to（work hoursnot、dependencyblocked、priorityconflict）
4. fixedplanning（increaseaddsource、adjust、longdeadlinedate）

## criticalrules
- criticalprioritytaskoverduetoL2
- involvesclienttaskoverduetoL3
- meetingpassmultioverdueshouldrecommendationreducefewmeeting
author: Project Management
